desc: Attack an adjacent unit.

name: Lobbed Shot
desc: Lob a shot over units and obstacles.

name: Lobbed Shot
desc: Lob a shot over units and obstacles.

name: Short Shot
desc: Shoot a unit in your line of sight.

name: Magic Dart
desc: Shoot a charged projectile within your line of sight. This attack counts as both magical and physical.

name: Short Lobbed Shot
desc: Lob a shot over units and obstacles.

name: Nail Throw
desc: Attack a unit in a straight line.

name: Melee Attack / Heal
desc: Heals allies but damages enemies.

name: Ranged Attack / Heal
desc: Heals allies but damages enemies.

name: Push Attack
desc: Dash forward one space, then melee attack with Knockback.

name: Melee Attack
desc: Attack an adjacent unit.

name: Lobbed Shot
desc: Lob a shot over units and obstacles.

name: Cleave
desc: Attack a unit adjacent or diagonally with Cleave.

name: Wide Cleave
desc: Attack a wide area with Cleave.

name: Spin Cleave
desc: Attack everything around you with Cleave.

name: Sing
desc: Heal and give +1 Temporary Damage to units in a wide area.

name: Sing
desc: Heal and give +1 Temporary Damage to units in a wide area.

name: Craft Weapon
desc: Craft and equip a random temporary weapon.

name: Throw Weapon
desc:
Throw your weapon at a unit.
[s:.7]This breaks the weapon.[/s]

name: Psychic Pull
desc: Pull a unit toward you from anywhere dealing low damage.

name: Leech Shot
desc: A lobbed attack that inflicts Leech 1.

name: Drain Attack
desc: A melee attack with Lifesteal.

name: Hook
desc: Pull an enemy to you.

name: Magic Missile
desc:
Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.
[s:.7](This attack's damage scales with your [img:int])[/s]

name: Suplex
desc: Grab a unit in front of you and slam it into the tile behind you.

name: Two-Hit Melee Attack
desc: Hits twice

name: Puke Shot
desc: Lob projectiles in an area.

name: Explosive Shot
desc: Lob a puke projectile that does splash damage to neighboring units.

name: Poke
desc: A melee attack that deals 1 damage.

name: Gerd Shot
desc: Lob a puke projectile that does splash damage to neighboring units. Damages you for 2 on use.

name: Spin Attack
desc: Attack all adjacent units.

name: Metronome
desc: Cast a random spell.
